title: 10 System Prompts That Make ChatGPT 10x More Useful At Work
description: Stop getting generic answers. These battle-tested system prompts turn ChatGPT into a focused expert for coding, writing, analysis, and more.

title: How to Build a Personal Prompt Library (And Why You Should)
description: If you use AI daily, you're probably rewriting the same prompts over and over. Here's how to build a reusable prompt library that actually saves time.

title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Should You Use for What?
description: Each AI platform has strengths. Here's a practical breakdown of when to use ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini based on real daily usage.
